evidence_label: current literature refresh for approval-record gate, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus one direct publisher page check
pubmed_query: (thalassemia OR beta-thalassemia) AND (HBG OR HbF OR erythroid OR hemolysis OR autophagy OR pyruvate kinase OR metabolism) AND 2026[pdat]

pubmed_records.role: current pyruvate-kinase activation review; supports metabolism as optional context, not an approval or outreach route
pubmed_records.title: Pyruvate Kinase Activation in the Management of Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Disease.

pubmed_records.role: gamma-globin regulation context; keeps HBG and HbF endpoints explicit
pubmed_records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

pubmed_records.role: erythroid metabolism review; supports ATP and glycolysis as optional endpoint addenda only
pubmed_records.title: Understanding and targeting erythroid cell metabolism.

pubmed_records.role: in vivo HBG promoter editing benchmark; not a first-quote action route
pubmed_records.title: In vivo genome editing of human haematopoietic stem cells for treatment of blood disorders using mRNA delivery.

pubmed_records.role: non-editing HbF pharmacology benchmark; high-caution source only
pubmed_records.title: Discovery of a Novel DNMT1 Inhibitor with Improved Efficacy in Treating beta-Thalassemia.

direct_publisher_checks.role: Guangxi ex vivo pyruvate-kinase activator source; supports optional metabolism-readout watch, not treatment or procurement scope
direct_publisher_checks.title: SNH-119014, a novel pyruvate kinase activator, enhances ATP production and reduces oxidative stress in erythroid cells from patients with beta-thalassemia major

decision_use: The June 16 source check does not change the first quote or approval boundary. It strengthens the need to keep metabolism sources labelable and optional, while keeping founder approval, recipient qualification, privacy, and response capture as separate operational blockers.
